§6HBM: Endgame§f

§aThe final frontier of NTM — exotic elements, ultimate reactors, and the most powerful machines ever devised!§f

After completing the nuclear age, we can now start working towards the endgame. This will be the most grindy part of your gameplay, so be ready. You will need the §bParticle Accelerator§f and §bExposure Chamber§f from the previous questline — these are the foundation for almost everything to come.

The endgame progression follows a clear path:
§b• Advanced Particle Accelerator§f — master the PA mechanics for exotic particle production
§b• Exotic Elements§f — Schrabidium (accelerator method), Euphemium, Dineutronium, Electronium
§b• Digamma§f — optional branch for the mysterious digamma particle and fuel
§b• Endgame Armors§f — DNT Nano Suit, Fau Armor, Euphemium Armor
§b• Soyuz-FG & Satellites§f — launch infrastructure for orbital payloads
§b• ICF Reactor§f — Inertial Confinement Fusion, the second most powerful reactor
§b• Gerald & Osmiridium§f — launch android, harvest exotic metal
§b• FEnSU§f — unlimited energy storage
§b• DFC§f — the ultimate Dark Fusion Core reactor

§6Getting Started§f:
Your first priority should be upgrading your §bParticle Accelerator§f with better coils and more RF cavities. The advanced PA mechanics allow you to produce Higgs Bosons, Dark Matter, Strange Quarks, and Sparkticle capsules — all essential for exotic materials.

§eTip§f: Set up a reliable power source first. Endgame machines consume MHEs to GHEs of power. A well-tuned ICF or multiple fusion reactors are recommended before attempting DFC construction.
